overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a coastal cobblestone path at dusk, passing a beached wooden longship, and continuing inland on a dirt trail toward a rural building with a red roof. The environment transitions from a waterfront cliffside to a grassy inland path with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside cobblestone path with beached vessel

events.description: path curves slightly right approaching the beached ship

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the coastal cobblestone path toward the beached wooden longship

entered.detail: weathered cobblestone path running along the cliff edge
low stone wall lining the left side of the path
large wooden Viking-style ship with red sail beached on the rocky shore
snow-capped mountain peak visible in the far background
wooden support structures and barricades along the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a cobblestone coastal path at dusk, with a stone wall on the left and the sea on the right. A large beached wooden longship with a red sail becomes visible ahead on the shoreline, while a snow-capped mountain rises in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from coastal stone to inland dirt trail

events.description: ground surface changes from cobblestone to broken stone and dirt as path moves inland
brief darkness as character passes through a shadow or tunnel area, then returns to dusk light

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path deteriorates and transitions away from the coastline toward inland grasslands

entered.detail: unpaved dirt path with patches of grass and gravel
wooden building with distinctive red roof visible in the distance ahead
grassy slopes and vegetation lining both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The path transitions from cobblestone to dirt as Geralt moves inland from the coast. The beached ship and stone wall fall behind, replaced by grassy terrain. A red-roofed building appears in the distance ahead. Brief darkness occurs around 35 seconds before returning to the dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassland toward farm building

events.description: path curves slightly left as the red roof building grows larger in the frame

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path approaching the red-roofed building in the rural landscape

entered.detail: cluster of pine trees on the right side of the path
wooden fence posts visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the open dirt trail through grassy terrain, with the red-roofed farmhouse growing larger ahead. Pine trees line the right side of the path while wooden fences appear in the distance. The environment is rural and quiet with no other characters present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a coastal cliffside path into a quiet, rural inland landscape at dusk. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path flanked by a stone wall and the sea, moving toward a large beached wooden longship with a red sail under a distant snow-capped mountain. As the camera moves further inland, the cobblestones shift into a dirt trail and the shoreline recedes, replaced by open grassy terrain and the distant silhouette of a red-roofed building. The scene then expands across the rural countryside, passing pine trees and wooden fences as the farmhouse grows larger in the frame. Finally, the path opens fully into the quiet greenery, leading the way toward the isolated building under the fading light of evening.
